## BUG-001

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-001                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Feature**      | FR-17 — Coupon Management                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR17-EP-007, FR17-EP-008, FR17-EP-010, FR17-EP-011, FR17-EP-012, FR17-EP-013, FR17-EP-014, FR17-EP-015, FR17-EP-016, FR17-EP-017, FR17-EP-018, FR17-EP-019, FR17-EP-020, FR17-EP-021, FR17-EP-022, FR17-EP-023, FR17-EP-024, FR17-EP-025, FR17-EP-026, FR17-EP-027, FR17-EP-028, FR17-BVA-001, FR17-BVA-002, FR17-BVA-008, FR17-BVA-009, FR17-BVA-010, FR17-BVA-011, FR17-BVA-016, FR17-BVA-017, FR17-BVA-022, FR17-BVA-023, FR17-BVA-028, FR17-BVA-034, FR17-BVA-035 |
| **Channel**      | API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Summary**      | POST /api/admin/coupons returns HTTP 200 instead of 400 when missing/invalid fields are submitted (per FR-17)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-18                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#18](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/18)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                            |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL) / Windows 11        |
| Runtime Env  | Edge Browser / cURL              |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000            |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5174            |
| Test Account | admin@eshop.com / test@eshop.com |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Obtain an admin JWT:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/login \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"email":"admin@eshop.com","password":"Admin123!"}'
   ```
3. Send the following request (empty code):
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/admin/coupons \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer <admin_token>" \
     -d '{"code":"", "type":"fixed", "discount_value":50000, "expired_at":"2027-12-31", "min_order_amount":500000, "max_uses_per_user":1}'
   ```
4. Observe the HTTP response status code.
5. Observe the response body.

**Note:** This root cause also causes the other Linked TCs to fail (system accepts invalid inputs for discount_value, dates, and types).

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-17**: The system must reject empty codes.

Specifically (based on FR17-EP-007):

- HTTP 400 Bad Request
- Response body should indicate the code cannot be empty.

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `200 OK`
- Response Body:
  ```json
  { "message": "Coupon created", "id": 5 }
  ```

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** The system accepts invalid, empty, or out-of-bounds data directly violating the validation rules defined in FR-17. This degrades data integrity but does not crash the system or bypass security.

### Priority Rationale

**High:** This breaks the core business rules for coupon creation. If admins create invalid coupons, users may exploit them or the system may break during checkout.

## BUG-002

| Field            | Value                                                                                                |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-002                                                                                              |
| **Feature**      | FR-17 — Coupon Management                                                                            |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR17-EP-009                                                                                          |
| **Channel**      | API                                                                                                  |
| **Summary**      | POST /api/admin/coupons returns HTTP 500 instead of 400 when duplicate code is submitted (per FR-17) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                  |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                               |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                                 |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                           |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-18                                                                                           |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#19](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/19)                                          |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                            |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL) / Windows 11        |
| Runtime Env  | Edge Browser / cURL              |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000            |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5174            |
| Test Account | admin@eshop.com / test@eshop.com |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Obtain an admin JWT:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/login \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"email":"admin@eshop.com","password":"Admin123!"}'
   ```
3. Send a POST request with an existing code (e.g. `SAVE10`):
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/admin/coupons \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer <admin_token>" \
     -d '{"code":"SAVE10", "type":"fixed", "discount_value":50000, "expired_at":"2027-12-31", "min_order_amount":500000, "max_uses_per_user":1}'
   ```
4. Observe the HTTP response status code.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-17**: The system must reject duplicate codes and return a validation error.

Specifically:

- HTTP 400 Bad Request
- Response body should indicate duplicate code.

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `500 Internal Server Error`
- Response Body: Server exception trace (`SQLITE_CONSTRAINT`).

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** Unhandled SQL unique constraint error surfaces as a 500 Internal Server Error instead of a 400 Bad Request validation message (per FR-17).

### Priority Rationale

**High:** Backend crashes/exceptions on standard user errors should be caught and handled gracefully to prevent service instability.

## BUG-003

| Field            | Value                                                                                            |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-003                                                                                          |
| **Feature**      | FR-17 — Coupon Management                                                                        |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR17-EP-029, FR17-EP-030, FR17-EP-031                                                            |
| **Channel**      | API                                                                                              |
| **Summary**      | DELETE /api/admin/coupons/:id returns HTTP 200 instead of 404 when ID does not exist (per FR-17) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                              |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                           |
| **Priority**     | Medium                                                                                           |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                       |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-18                                                                                       |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#20](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/20)                                      |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                            |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL) / Windows 11        |
| Runtime Env  | Edge Browser / cURL              |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000            |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5174            |
| Test Account | admin@eshop.com / test@eshop.com |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Obtain an admin JWT:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/login \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"email":"admin@eshop.com","password":"Admin123!"}'
   ```
3. Send a DELETE request to a non-existent ID:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X DELETE http://localhost:3000/api/admin/coupons/99999 \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer <admin_token>"
   ```
4. Observe the HTTP response status code.

**Note:** This also occurs for non-numeric and zero IDs.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-17**: The system should return a 404 Not Found (or 400) if the coupon ID to delete does not exist.

Specifically:

- HTTP 404 Not Found

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `200 OK`
- Response Body:
  ```json
  { "message": "Coupon deleted" }
  ```

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** The deletion endpoint succeeds silently even if the resource doesn't exist. This violates standard REST principles and FR-17's implicit rules.

### Priority Rationale

**Medium:** Does not block users or admins, but causes confusing UI states where an admin might think they deleted something they didn't.

## BUG-004

| Field            | Value                                                                                         |
| ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-004                                                                                       |
| **Feature**      | FR-17 — Coupon Management                                                                     |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR17-EP-033, FR17-EP-036, FR17-EP-038                                                         |
| **Channel**      | Role-Auth                                                                                     |
| **Summary**      | Admin endpoints accept User JWT and perform action instead of returning HTTP 403 (per SEC-03) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                           |
| **Severity**     | Serious                                                                                       |
| **Priority**     | Immediate                                                                                     |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                    |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-18                                                                                    |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#21](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/21)                                   |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                            |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL) / Windows 11        |
| Runtime Env  | Edge Browser / cURL              |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000            |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5174            |
| Test Account | admin@eshop.com / test@eshop.com |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Obtain a standard USER JWT:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/login \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"email":"test@eshop.com","password":"Test1234!"}'
   ```
3. Send the following restricted POST request using the User JWT:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/admin/coupons \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer <user_token>" \
     -d '{"code":"HACKER25", "type":"fixed", "discount_value":10, "expired_at":"2027-12-31", "min_order_amount":0, "max_uses_per_user":1}'
   ```
4. Observe that the HTTP response is 200 OK instead of 403 Forbidden.

**Note:** This vulnerability affects GET, POST, and DELETE /api/coupons endpoints.

### Expected Behavior

Per **SEC-03**: All administrative endpoints must explicitly verify that the JWT token belongs to a user with the `admin` role.

Specifically:

- HTTP 403 Forbidden

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `200 OK`
- The user token is accepted, and the restricted action is successfully performed.

### Severity Rationale

**Serious:** CRITICAL ROLE BYPASS. Any standard user can call the Admin Coupon endpoints to view, create, and delete coupons. This directly violates SEC-03.

### Priority Rationale

**Immediate:** This is a major security vulnerability that must be hotfixed immediately before any deployment.

## BUG-005

| Field            | Value                                                                                        |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-005                                                                                      |
| **Feature**      | FR-17 — Coupon Management                                                                    |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR17-EP-034                                                                                  |
| **Channel**      | Role-Auth                                                                                    |
| **Summary**      | POST /api/admin/coupons returns HTTP 403 instead of 401 when token is malformed (per SEC-02) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                          |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                       |
| **Priority**     | Low                                                                                          |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                   |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-18                                                                                   |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#22](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/22)                                  |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                            |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL) / Windows 11        |
| Runtime Env  | Edge Browser / cURL              |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000            |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5174            |
| Test Account | admin@eshop.com / test@eshop.com |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Send a POST request to the endpoint with an invalid/malformed token:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/admin/coupons \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer MALFORMED_TOKEN_123" \
     -d '{"code":"TEST"}'
   ```
2. Observe the HTTP status code is 403 instead of 401.

### Expected Behavior

Per **SEC-02**: The system must return 401 Unauthorized for malformed, missing, or invalid tokens.

Specifically:

- HTTP 401 Unauthorized

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `403 Forbidden`

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** Using 403 for an unauthenticated/invalid token state is non-standard (should be 401 Unauthorized per SEC-02), but the system successfully blocks the action.

### Priority Rationale

**Low:** The system remains secure since the action is blocked, it just uses the wrong status code.

## BUG-006

| Field            | Value                                                                                        |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-006                                                                                      |
| **Feature**      | FR-17 — Coupon Management                                                                    |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR17-EP-006                                                                                  |
| **Channel**      | DOM                                                                                          |
| **Summary**      | Admin UI is missing required field markers and has incorrect heading text (per FR-21, FR-22) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                          |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                       |
| **Priority**     | Medium                                                                                       |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                   |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-18                                                                                   |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#23](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/23)                                  |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                            |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL) / Windows 11        |
| Runtime Env  | Edge Browser / cURL              |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000            |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5174            |
| Test Account | admin@eshop.com / test@eshop.com |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Admin UI at http://localhost:5174 and log in with admin credentials.
2. Navigate to Coupon Management tab on the left.
3. Open DevTools: F12 → Console tab.
4. Run the DOM checks script (or inspect the form visually):

   ```js
   (function FR17DOMChecks() {
     "use strict";

     let pass = 0,
       fail = 0;
     const results = [];

     function check(tcId, description, expected, actualFn) {
       let actual, status;
       try {
         actual = actualFn();
         const ok =
           expected === "EXISTS"
             ? actual !== null &&
               actual !== undefined &&
               actual !== "NOT_FOUND" &&
               actual !== false
             : String(actual) === String(expected);
         status = ok ? "PASS" : "FAIL";
       } catch (e) {
         actual = "ERROR: " + e.message;
         status = "FAIL";
       }
       status === "PASS" ? pass++ : fail++;
       results.push({
         "TC ID": tcId,
         Check: description,
         Expected: String(expected),
         Actual: String(actual),
         Status: status,
       });
     }

     // ── FR17-EP-006: Verify DOM properties for Coupon Management form ──────────
     // Per FR-21: Exactly one <h1> on the page
     check(
       "FR17-EP-006-h1",
       "Exactly one <h1> tag on page (per FR-21)",
       "1",
       () => document.querySelectorAll("h1").length,
     );

     // Per FR-22: Mandatory fields marked with asterisk (*)
     check(
       "FR17-EP-006-required-star",
       "At least one label with '*' marking mandatory field (per FR-22)",
       "EXISTS",
       () => {
         const labels = Array.from(
           document.querySelectorAll("label, span, p, th"),
         );
         const found = labels.some((el) => el.textContent.includes("*"));
         return found ? "EXISTS" : "NOT_FOUND";
       },
     );

     // Per FR-17: expired_at field uses input type="date"
     check(
       "FR17-EP-006-date-input",
       "expired_at field has type='date' (per FR-17)",
       "EXISTS",
       () => {
         const dateInput = document.querySelector("input[type='date']");
         return dateInput ? "EXISTS" : "NOT_FOUND";
       },
     );

     // Per FR-21: Create button should have blue styling
     check(
       "FR17-EP-006-create-btn",
       "Create coupon button exists on page (per FR-21)",
       "EXISTS",
       () => {
         const btns = Array.from(
           document.querySelectorAll("button, input[type='submit']"),
         );
         const createBtn = btns.find((b) =>
           /create|thêm|tạo/i.test(b.textContent),
         );
         return createBtn ? "EXISTS" : "NOT_FOUND";
       },
     );

     // Per FR-21: Delete button should have red styling
     check(
       "FR17-EP-006-delete-btn",
       "Delete coupon button exists on page (per FR-21)",
       "EXISTS",
       () => {
         const btns = Array.from(
           document.querySelectorAll("button, input[type='submit']"),
         );
         const delBtn = btns.find((b) =>
           /delete|remove|xóa/i.test(b.textContent),
         );
         return delBtn ? "EXISTS" : "NOT_FOUND";
       },
     );

     // Per FR-21: Page heading text should mention "Coupon" or "Mã giảm giá"
     check(
       "FR17-EP-006-heading-text",
       "Page <h1> heading references 'Coupon' or 'Mã giảm giá'",
       "EXISTS",
       () => {
         const h1 = document.querySelector("h1");
         if (!h1) return "NOT_FOUND";
         return /coupon|mã giảm giá/i.test(h1.textContent)
           ? "EXISTS"
           : "NOT_FOUND";
       },
     );

     // Check no script injection alert on page (SEC-04 — XSS safe rendering)
     // Run AFTER creating a coupon with code = <script>alert(1)</script>
     check(
       "FR17-EP-038-xss",
       "No raw <script>alert(1)</script> injected into DOM (per SEC-04)",
       "SAFE",
       () => {
         return document.body.innerHTML.includes("<script>alert(1)</script>")
           ? "VULNERABLE"
           : "SAFE";
       },
     );

     // ── Summary Output ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight:bold;color:#333",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c FR-17 TEST RESULTS — DOM CHECKS (FR17-EP-006)",
       "font-weight:bold;font-size:14px;color:#0056b3",
     );
     console.log("%c URL: " + window.location.href, "color:#666");
     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight:bold;color:#333",
     );
     console.table(results);
     const color =
       fail === 0
         ? "color:#28a745;font-weight:bold"
         : "color:#dc3545;font-weight:bold";
     console.log(
       `TOTAL: %c${pass} PASS%c | %c${fail} FAIL`,
       "color: green; font-weight: bold",
       "color: inherit",
       "color: red; font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight:bold;color:#333",
     );
     console.log(
       "%cScreenshot this panel and paste the summary into Phase B.",
       "color:#888;font-style:italic",
     );
   })();
   ```

5. Observe the missing `*` on the code, type, and value fields, and the mismatched heading text.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-21 and FR-22**: Mandatory fields must be marked with an asterisk (`*`), and heading text must match the specified design.

Specifically:

- `*` should be present next to required fields
- Heading text should match requirement exactly.

### Actual Behavior

DOM checks failed: No required-field `*` found. Heading text mismatch.

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** The UI lacks visual indications for required fields (`*`), violating standard usability conventions and explicit FR-22 requirements.

### Priority Rationale

**Medium:** Does not block coupon creation, but degrades the administrator's user experience.
